summary: Iteration 17: Complete testing of DioAI Resume & LinkedIn Optimizer new features. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working (Fix button, Copy to Editor, Font Color picker, 8 visual templates, smart PDF filename).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/resume/pricing returns pricing with currency EUR
Backend: POST /api/resume/upload accepts PDF files, returns resume_id, text_preview, word_count
Backend: POST /api/resume/upload rejects invalid file formats with 400
Backend: POST /api/resume/analyze returns analysis with overall_score, ats_score, strengths, weaknesses, missing_keywords, suggestions
Backend: POST /api/resume/analyze returns 404 for nonexistent resume
Backend: POST /api/resume/quick-fix returns fixed_text
Backend: POST /api/resume/improve returns improved_text
Backend: GET /api/resume/get-text/{resume_id} returns text and filename (new endpoint)
Backend: GET /api/resume/get-text/nonexistent returns 404
Backend: POST /api/resume/linkedin returns headlines, about, keywords
Backend: GET /api/resume/templates returns template list
Backend: POST /api/resume/checkout creates Stripe checkout session
Frontend: Resume Optimizer page loads at /resume-optimizer with step indicators (Upload, Analysis, Optimize, Download)
Frontend: Upload step has file input for PDF/DOCX and Google Drive button
Frontend: AI Analysis displays Overall Score and ATS Score with score rings
Frontend: Analysis shows Strengths, Weaknesses, Missing Keywords, Suggestions sections
Frontend: Score Comparison section with 'Choose File to Compare' button
Frontend: Score Comparison shows side-by-side ORIGINAL vs NEW VERSION scores
Frontend: 'Copy to Editor' button in Score Comparison (uses new get-text endpoint)
Frontend: 'Fix My Resume' button applies AI fixes and moves to results step
Frontend: 8 visual templates (Classic, Modern, Executive, Minimal, Bold, Elegant, Corporate, Creative)
Frontend: Rich text editor toolbar has Bold, Italic, Underline, Heading, Bullet List, Divider, Font Color, Undo, Redo (9 buttons)
Frontend: Font color picker opens with 9 color options (Black, Dark Gray, Blue, Navy, Teal, Red, Amber, Green, Purple)
Frontend: Font size controls (A-/13/A+) visible and functional
Frontend: Pay button shows correct EUR currency with price
critical_code_review_comments: New GET /api/resume/get-text/{resume_id} endpoint correctly returns resume text for copy feature
ScoreComparison.jsx properly calls get-text API and falls back to cached text_preview if API fails
RichEditor.jsx FONT_COLORS array has 9 colors matching the color picker UI
VISUAL_TEMPLATES in constants.js has all 8 professional templates defined
Quick-fix (Fix My Resume) endpoint uses AI analysis data to improve resume while preserving structure
seed_data_creation: Created test PDF at /tmp/test_resume_iteration17.pdf with JOHN DOE resume content for testing upload/analyze/fix flows
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working: (1) Fix button applies AI suggestions via /api/resume/quick-fix endpoint, (2) Copy from comparison uses new /api/resume/get-text/{resume_id} endpoint, (3) Font color picker in RichEditor has 9 colors in FONT_COLORS array, (4) 8 visual templates defined in constants.js and selectable in UI, (5) Smart PDF filename extracts name and title from resume content, (6) LinkedIn optimizer behind paywall works via /api/resume/linkedin, (7) Payment flow creates Stripe checkout via /api/resume/checkout. Database templates (5) shown during analysis step, visual templates (8) shown on results step.

features_verified.fix_my_resume_button: WORKING - Applies AI fixes via quick-fix endpoint, preserves structure, moves to results step
features_verified.copy_from_comparison: WORKING - Uses new get-text endpoint, loads comparison resume into editor
features_verified.font_color_picker: WORKING - 9 colors (Black, Dark Gray, Blue, Navy, Teal, Red, Amber, Green, Purple) in dropdown
features_verified.visual_templates: WORKING - 8 templates (Classic, Modern, Executive, Minimal, Bold, Elegant, Corporate, Creative)
features_verified.smart_pdf_filename: WORKING - Extracts name and job title from resume content for filename
features_verified.linkedin_optimizer: WORKING - Returns headlines, about, keywords (behind paywall)
features_verified.payment_flow: WORKING - Creates Stripe checkout session with EUR currency
